name: manage-layout
description: Manage cmux layout: split panes, resize, move surfaces, create/close workspaces

tasks.detail:
Run cmux_tree() to get full picture:
- [ ] All workspaces, panes, surfaces mapped
- [ ] Current active workspace/pane
- [ ] Identify what needs to change
Gate: Current layout fully understood.

Execute the requested layout operations:
- [ ] cmux_new_split(direction, command) — if splitting panes
- [ ] cmux_resize_pane(pane, direction, amount) — if resizing
- [ ] cmux_move_surface(surface, direction) — if moving surfaces
- [ ] cmux_swap_pane(pane, target) — if swapping
- [ ] cmux_close_surface(surface) — if closing
- [ ] cmux_new_workspace(name, cwd, command) — if creating workspace
- [ ] cmux_select_workspace(workspace) — if switching focus
Gate: All layout commands executed without error.

Run cmux_tree() again:
- [ ] Confirm changes applied as expected
- [ ] No orphaned panes/surfaces
- [ ] Worker servers still healthy (if applicable)
Gate: Layout matches expected state.

Summarize what was changed:
- [ ] Before/after layout comparison
- [ ] New workspace/surface refs
- [ ] Any port assignments
Optionally: cmux_notify(title="Layout Updated", body="...")
Gate: User knows the new layout.
